title: Ship viewer/ in the Template so the stamped viewer-server has a page to serve
description: EXEC-054 stamps a viewer-server daemon whose whitelist serves viewer/* assets, but the viewer (built root-only in sprint 3, EXEC-036) is not in the Template — a fresh Instance's enabled viewer_server serves .excn JSON and 404s the page itself. Promote viewer/ (index.html, styles.css, viewer.js, README) into src/template/viewer/ as stamped invariant layout; the root Instance's copy becomes the mirror; update then keeps Instance viewers current. Brooks-directed at sprint-5 review.
acceptance_criteria: viewer assets live at .excn/viewer/ (template and Instance) — nothing stamped at the host root beyond the pointer block (ADR-0002)
A fresh stamped Instance with viewer_server enabled serves the status page end-to-end
viewer/ files are invariant-classed (update refreshes them, drift reported not overwritten)
Root viewer/ is byte-identical to the template copy (Src-First)
fix: viewer promoted into the Template at .excn/viewer/ per ADR-0002 ruling (root mirrored via git mv); daemon whitelist + index mapping repointed; root-absolute asset refs fix a pre-existing 404 at bare /; whitelist gains the issues/sprints JSON the board fetches. code-standards PASS, package-qa PASS.
notes: Filed 2026-06-10 (Brooks, sprint-5 review). Brooks ruling 2026-06-10: viewer relocates into .excn/viewer/ — the first delivery placed it at the Instance root.
